title: Chisel 7.3.0 generated Mux1H simulates slower than Chisel 6

features.name: one_hot_encoding_via_left_shift
features.description: Code should include a one-hot encoding pattern where a single-bit value is left-shifted by an index variable to create a one-hot bit vector

features.name: one_hot_mux_via_bit_index_select
features.description: Code should include a Mux1H-style pattern where each bit of a one-hot vector selects between a data value and zero, combined with OR reduction

features.name: wide_bitvector_shift_operation
features.description: Code should include a shift operation on a wide bit vector (>= 128 bits) used in a performance-critical mux path
